<content>1: # Spec: 260316-auto-877
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: Fix the redirect destination after completing an interactive lesson. When a student finishes an interactive lesson (via the ExercisesPager) and clicks "Finish", they should be redirected to the lesson page (showing the current/interactive view), not to the chapter page (which is the "old" display behavior).
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### FR-001: Fix Lesson Completion Redirect Destination
10: 
11: **Priority**: MUST
12: **Description**: When a student completes all exercises in an interactive lesson and clicks "Finish" on the outro screen, they should be redirected to the current lesson page (`/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}/lessons/{lessonSlug}`), not to the chapter page (`/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}`).
13: 
14: **Root Cause**: The `backUrl` variable in the LessonPage (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` line 86) is set to `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}` (chapter page), but should be `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}` (lesson page).
15: 
16: **Location**: `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx`
17: 
18: ### FR-002: Ensure Consistent Navigation Across All Lesson Flows
19: 
20: **Priority**: MUST
21: **Description**: The navigation behavior should be consistent across all lesson completion flows:
22: - ExercisePage (individual exercise) → backUrl = lesson page ✅ (correct)
23: - CompletePage (/complete route) → backUrl = lesson page ✅ (correct)
24: - ExercisesPager (interactive lesson flow) → backUrl = chapter page ❌ (incorrect - should be lesson page)
25: 
26: ## Acceptance Criteria
27: 
28: - [ ] When a student completes an interactive lesson via ExercisesPager and clicks "Finish", they are redirected to the lesson page (`/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}/lessons/{lessonSlug}`)
29: - [ ] The redirect goes to the lesson page, not the chapter page
30: - [ ] This behavior matches the ExercisePage and CompletePage flows which already use the lesson page as backUrl
31: - [ ] The fix applies only to the LessonPage's backUrl variable
32: 
33: ## Guardrails
34: 
35: - Do not modify the ExercisePage (`exercises/[exerciseSlug]/page.tsx`) - it already has the correct backUrl
36: - Do not modify the CompletePage (`complete/page.tsx`) - it already has the correct backUrl
37: - Only modify the LessonPage (`page.tsx`) backUrl
38: 
39: ## Out of Scope
40: 
41: - Does not address any other navigation issues
42: - Does not modify the PDF/document view flow
43: - Does not change the chapter page behavior

(End of file - total 43 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# Spec: 260316-auto-877

## Overview

Fix the redirect destination after completing an interactive lesson. When a student finishes an interactive lesson (via the ExercisesPager) and clicks "Finish", they should be redirected to the lesson page (showing the current/interactive view), not to the chapter page (which is the "old" display behavior).

## Requirements

### FR-001: Fix Lesson Completion Redirect Destination

**Priority**: MUST
**Description**: When a student completes all exercises in an interactive lesson and clicks "Finish" on the outro screen, they should be redirected to the current lesson page (`/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}/lessons/{lessonSlug}`), not to the chapter page (`/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}`).

**Root Cause**: The `backUrl` variable in the LessonPage (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` line 86) is set to `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}` (chapter page), but should be `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}` (lesson page).

**Location**: `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx`

### FR-002: Ensure Consistent Navigation Across All Lesson Flows

**Priority**: MUST

<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Plan: 260316-auto-877
2: 
3: ## Rerun Context
4: 
5: This is a rerun requested via `/cody rerun`. No previous plan/build/review files exist — only a rerun-feedback.md with a generic rerun trigger. The approach from the spec (gap analysis) is correct: the `backUrl` variable in LessonPage points to the chapter page instead of the lesson page, causing the ExercisesPager "Finish" button to redirect to the wrong page. The plan below implements this fix with a TDD reproduction test.
6: 
7: ## Research Findings
8: 
9: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 86: `const backUrl = '/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}'` (the bug)
10: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 101: `const backUrl = '/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}'` (correct reference pattern)
11: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/complete/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 81: same correct pattern
12: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ExercisesPager/index.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 313: `<SystemLink href={backUrl}>` (the "Finish" button on outro screen uses backUrl directly)
13: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ExercisesPager/useExercisesPager.ts` ✅ exists — Manages page state (intro/about/exercise/outro), does NOT own backUrl
14: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/_components/ExerciseWorkspace/index.tsx` ✅ exists — Receives backUrl prop, passes to ExerciseHeader
15: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/_components/ExerciseHeader/index.tsx` ✅ exists — `handleBack` uses `router.back()` first, `backUrl` only as fallback (no meaningful change from fix)
16: - `tests/unit/` ✅ directory exists — unit test pattern uses vitest with `vitest.config.unit.mts`
17: - `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts` 🆕 will create
18: 
19: **Patterns observed:**
20: - All three page files (`page.tsx`, `exercises/[exerciseSlug]/page.tsx`, `complete/page.tsx`) construct `backUrl` as a simple template literal string
21: - ExercisesPager uses `backUrl` prop for: (1) outro "Finish" button `<SystemLink href={backUrl}>`, (2) ExerciseWorkspace back header
22: - ExerciseHeader's `handleBack()` prefers `router.back()` (browser history) over `backUrl`; backUrl is only a fallback when no history exists
23: 
24: **Integration points:**
25: - `backUrl` flows: LessonPage → ExercisesPager → ExerciseWorkspace → ExerciseHeader
26: - `backUrl` flows: LessonPage → ExerciseWorkspace (empty lesson case) → ExerciseHeader
27: - Changing the single variable on line 86 will fix the "Finish" button redirect and has negligible impact on the back arrow (which prefers browser history)
28: 
29: ## Reuse Inventory
30: 
31: - No new utilities needed
32: - No new components needed
33: - Only a one-line change in an existing file
34: 
35: ---
36: 
37: ### Step 1: Write reproduction test + Fix backUrl in LessonPage
38: 
39: **Root Cause**: The `backUrl` variable in `LessonPage` (line 86) is set to `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}` (chapter page). When the ExercisesPager renders the "outro" screen and the student clicks "Finish", the `<SystemLink href={backUrl}>` navigates to the chapter page instead of the lesson page. The fix is to change the backUrl to include `/lessons/${lessonSlug}`.
40: 
41: **Files to Touch**:
42: - `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts` (NEW) — reproduction test
43: - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` (MODIFIED — line 86)
44: 
45: **Reproduction Test**: Write a unit test that validates the backUrl construction pattern (MUST FAIL before fix):
46: 
47: - Test location: `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts`
48: - What it tests: A pure function test that extracts the backUrl construction logic and verifies it produces the lesson page URL (not the chapter page URL)
49: - The test imports and reads the actual page source file, extracts the `backUrl` template literal, and asserts it includes `/lessons/` in the path pattern
50: - Why it fails before fix: The current code constructs `backUrl` without the `/lessons/${lessonSlug}` suffix
51: 
52: ```
53: Test: "LessonPage backUrl should point to the lesson page, not the chapter page"
54: - Extract the backUrl assignment from page.tsx using a regex/string search
55: - Assert the pattern includes `lessons/` segment
56: - Before fix: FAILS because backUrl = `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}` (no lessons segment)
57: - After fix: PASSES because backUrl = `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}`
58: ```
59: 
60: **Fix**: Change line 86 in `page.tsx` from:
61: ```typescript
62: const backUrl = `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}`
63: ```
64: to:
65: ```typescript
66: const backUrl = `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}`
67: ```
68: 
69: **Verification**:
70: - Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts --config vitest.config.unit.mts`
71: - Before fix → test FAILS (backUrl points to chapter page)
72: - After fix → test PASSES (backUrl points to lesson page)
73: - Run: `pnpm -s tsc --noEmit` — no type errors
74: - Manual verification: On the ExercisesPager outro screen, the "Finish" `<SystemLink>` now navigates to `/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}/lessons/{lessonSlug}` instead of `/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}`
75: 
76: **Acceptance Criteria** (ref: FR-001, FR-002):
77: - [ ] `backUrl` on line 86 includes `/lessons/${lessonSlug}`
78: - [ ] The URL pattern matches ExercisePage (line 101) and CompletePage (line 81) for consistency
79: - [ ] Unit test passes asserting the correct URL pattern
80: - [ ] TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
81: - [ ] No other files are modified (ExercisePage, CompletePage remain unchanged)

(End of file - total 81 lines)
</content>

# Plan: 260316-auto-877

## Rerun Context

This is a rerun requested via `/cody rerun`. No previous plan/build/review files exist — only a rerun-feedback.md with a generic rerun trigger. The approach from the spec (gap analysis) is correct: the `backUrl` variable in LessonPage points to the chapter page instead of the lesson page, causing the ExercisesPager "Finish" button to redirect to the wrong page. The plan below implements this fix with a TDD reproduction test.

## Research Findings

- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 86: `const backUrl = '/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}'` (the bug)
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 101: `const backUrl = '/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}'` (correct reference pattern)
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/complete/page.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 81: same correct pattern
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ExercisesPager/index.tsx` ✅ exists — Line 313: `<SystemLink href={backUrl}>` (the "Finish" button on outro screen uses backUrl directly)
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ExercisesPager/useExercisesPager.ts` ✅ exists — Manages page state (intro/about/exercise/outro), does NOT own backUrl
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/_components/ExerciseWorkspace/index.tsx` ✅ exists — Receives backUrl prop, passes to ExerciseHeader
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/exercises/[exerciseSlug]/_components/ExerciseHeader/index.tsx` ✅ exists — `handleBack` uses `router.back()` first, `backUrl` only as fallback (no meaningful change from fix)
- `tests/unit/` ✅ directory exists — unit test pattern uses vitest with `vitest.config.unit.mts`
- `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts` 🆕 will create

**Patterns observed:**
- All three page files (`page.tsx`, `exercises/[exerciseSlug]/page.tsx`, `complete/page.tsx`) construct `backUrl` as a simple template literal string

input.content:
# Build Agent Report: 260316-auto-877

## Changes

- **Fixed `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx`** (line 86): Changed the `backUrl` variable from `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}` (chapter page) to `/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}/lessons/${lessonSlug}` (lesson page). This fixes the redirect destination after completing an interactive lesson - students will now be redirected to the lesson page instead of the chapter page.

- **Created `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts`**: Added a reproduction test that validates the backUrl construction pattern in LessonPage, ExercisePage, and CompletePage to ensure consistency. The test verifies that:
  - The backUrl includes the `/lessons/` segment
  - The pattern matches the expected format with courseSlug, chapterSlug, and lessonSlug
  - The pattern is consistent across all three page files

## Tests Written

- `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts` - 3 test cases:
  - LessonPage backUrl should point to the lesson page, not the chapter page
  - Should be consistent with ExercisePage backUrl pattern  
  - Should be consistent with CompletePage backUrl pattern

## Deviations

None — plan followed exactly.

## Quality

- TypeScript: PASS (`pnpm -s tsc --noEmit` - no errors)
- Lint: PASS (`pnpm -s lint` - no errors)
- Unit Tests: PASS (`pnpm vitest run tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts` - 3/3 tests pass)

Implementation complete. Here's a summary:

## Summary

**Bug Fixed**: The `backUrl` variable in LessonPage (`page.tsx` line 86) was incorrectly pointing to the chapter page (`/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}`) instead of the lesson page. This caused the ExercisesPager "Finish" button to redirect students to the wrong page after completing an interactive lesson.

**Changes Made**:
1. **Fixed `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx`** (line 86): Changed `backUrl` to include `/lessons/${lessonSlug}` so it now correctly points to the lesson page.

2. **Created `tests/unit/lesson-backurl.test.ts`**: Added 3 test cases to verify the backUrl pattern and ensure consistency with ExercisePage and CompletePage.

**Quality Verification**:
- TypeScript: ✅ PASS
- Lint: ✅ PASS  
- Unit Tests: ✅ 3/3 PASS
